name: Apple Cake Eden
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F and grease an 8-inch flan pan or a small round springform pan.
2. Mix flour, salt, and baking powder together with your hands until the mixture is crumbly.
3. Add butter or margarine to the dry ingredients and combine until well blended.
4. Stir in sugar and lemon rind. Set aside to cool slightly.
5. Peel apples and grate them on large holes of a grater. Place grated apples, along with 1/2 cup sugar, in a colander and let drain for about 15 minutes.
6. Mix the drained apples with cinnamon in the colander.
7. Add beaten egg to the crust mixture and knead well. The dough will still be crumbly.
8. Press 3/4 of the dough evenly over the bottom and sides of the pan.
9. Sprinkle remaining sugar and cinnamon over the apples.
10. Spread apples over the dough in the pan, then place a large apple on top.
11. Bake for 30 minutes or until apples are tender. The recipe can be doubled for a larger cake. Best served cold.
